```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
h1, h2, h3 {
  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
}

body {
  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: 1em;
}
</style>
```

::: {.text-center}
# Tutorials
:::

**Fall 2025**

- Stochastic Processes ([Prof. N. Chopin](https://nchopin.github.io/)) — graduate course, 30 students @ [ENSAE Paris](https://www.ensae.fr/)


---
